sourceAmbiguity: Rebind or hold state might still show detail because the user previously had access.
decisionTaken: Gate every hold, rebind, and wrong-patient freeze render through summary_only PatientAudienceCoverageProjection.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Current audience and hold posture overrides prior access before render.
operationalRisk: New detail fields could bypass the allowed-field list.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add fields only through AccessGrantScopeEnvelope and update validator suppression checks.
